channel.title: GitHub Unknown Languages Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Unknown Languages in GitHub

item.title: xszyou/Fay
item.description: Fay is an open-source digital human framework integrating language models and digital characters. It offers retail, assistant, and agent versions for diverse applications like virtual shopping guides, broadcasters, assistants, waiters, teachers, and voice or text-based mobile assistants.

item.title: cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
item.description: A curated list of free courses & certifications.

item.title: aishwaryanr/awesome-generative-ai-guide
item.description: A one stop repository for generative AI research updates, interview resources, notebooks and much more!

item.title: 1c7/chinese-independent-developer
item.description: 👩🏿‍💻👨🏾‍💻👩🏼‍💻👨🏽‍💻👩🏻‍💻中国独立开发者项目列表 -- 分享大家都在做什么

item.title: Pawdroid/Free-servers
item.description: 🚀 免费订阅地址，🚀 免费节点，🚀 6小时更新一次，共享节点，节点质量高可用，完全免费。免费clash订阅地址，免费翻墙、免费科学上网、免费梯子、免费ss/v2ray/trojan节点、谷歌商店、翻墙梯子。注意：目前进入官网需开启代理。

item.title: ai-boost/awesome-prompts
item.description: Curated list of chatgpt prompts from the top-rated GPTs in the GPTs Store. Prompt Engineering, prompt attack & prompt protect. Advanced Prompt Engineering papers.

item.description: Building the best system design resource in the internet

item.description: 🦄️ 🎃 👻 Clash Premium 规则集(RULE-SET)，兼容 ClashX Pro、Clash for Windows 客户端。

item.title: HqWu-HITCS/Awesome-Chinese-LLM
item.description: 整理开源的中文大语言模型，以规模较小、可私有化部署、训练成本较低的模型为主，包括底座模型，垂直领域微调及应用，数据集与教程等。

item.title: Alvin9999/new-pac
item.description: 翻墙-科学上网、自由上网、免费科学上网、免费翻墙、油管youtube、fanqiang、VPN、一键翻墙浏览器，vps一键搭建翻墙服务器脚本/教程，免费shadowsocks/ss/ssr/v2ray/goflyway账号/节点，翻墙梯子，电脑、手机、iOS、安卓、windows、Mac、Linux、路由器翻墙、科学上网

item.description: The LLVM Project is a collection of modular and reusable compiler and toolchain technologies.
